item.title: Issue #2520 created
item.description:
build-dateTime, parts-of-dateTime, and the year zero problem

The spec needs to mention the year zero problem.

I think we should make build-dateTime and parts-of-dateTime consistent with string-to-date and date-to-string conversion, which gives the implementation three options:

(a) reject all dates earlier than +1.

(b) follow XSD 1.0: year 0 is not allowed, year -1 is the year before +1

(c) follow XSD 1.1: year 0 is allowed, year -1 is the year before 0, which is the year before +1.
